introSection: Keverbaan was a steel roller coaster located at Bellewaerde Park in Ypres, West Flanders, Flemish Region, Belgium. Keverbaan is French for Beetle Coaster.

sections.title: History
sections.content: In early 2022, Bellewaerde announced that Keverbaan will close on 6 November 2022. Some of the cars were auctioned to raise money for charity.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Keverbaan is a Zierer Tivoli Large model. This model has a double figure eight layout, which is two figure eights with a circle around them.

fullText:
Keverbaan was a steel roller coaster located at Bellewaerde Park in Ypres, West Flanders, Flemish Region, Belgium. Keverbaan is French for Beetle Coaster.

In early 2022, Bellewaerde announced that Keverbaan will close on 6 November 2022. Some of the cars were auctioned to raise money for charity.

Keverbaan is a Zierer Tivoli Large model. This model has a double figure eight layout, which is two figure eights with a circle around them.
